items.label: Freedom to Tailor Your Stay
items.body: From extended business trips to corporate retreats and seminars, FARMform offers the flexibility to match your needs. Enjoy the freedom to work, stay and unwind on your terms – in an exclusive, personalised setting.

items.label: Eco-Friendly and Sustainable
items.body: Our thoughtfully rebuilt farm reflects a deep commitment to the environment, using sustainable materials and technologies to create a space that respects nature while offering modern comfort.

items.label: Convenient and Connected
items.body: Located in Londerzeel, FARMform is perfectly positioned near major business hubs – Brussels Airport (25km), Brussels City Center (20km), Antwerp (30km) and Mechelen (20km). Experience peace and privacy with easy access to where business happens.

items.label: One-Price Concept
items.body: We keep it simple: our One-Price Concept ensures simple, transparent pricing with no hidden costs. Inclusions are clearly detailed per service, so you always know what to expect.

items.label: Nature-Infused Experience
items.body: Step away from the noise! FARMform offers an intimate, peaceful setting with open field views and the calming presence of animals – a pony, a dog, cats, chickens and rabbits — roaming freely around the property. Whether you are taking a break, strolling the grounds or unwinding after a long day, their presence adds a unique and relaxing touch to your stay.

items.label: Equipped for Professionals
items.body: FARMform is designed with professionals in mind. From high-end meeting spaces to private rooms and wellness facilities (fitness and sauna), every detail supports productivity, focus, collaboration and comfort – whether you are working, hosting an event, collaborating with a team or simply recharging after a busy day.

items.label: Multilingual Team
items.body: To ensure smooth communication and a personalised experience, our team speaks English, Dutch, French, German and Romanian. No matter your language, we are here to help.

feature_groups.heading: Technologies
feature_groups.note: We intentionally do not support video conferencing. FARMform is designed to foster genuine, in-person interaction in a focused and inspiring environment.

feature_groups.heading: Amenities
feature_groups.intro: Each detail is designed to enhance your experience, ensuring comfort, productivity and inspiration throughout your time at FARMform.

items.label: Coffee Corner
items.body: Enjoy a continuously stocked coffee corner with complimentary beverages to keep you refreshed throughout the day.

items.label: Natural Daylight
items.body: Large windows flood the rooms with daylight, creating a bright, energising and productive work environment.

items.label: Inspiring Views
items.body: Admire the serene views of the surrounding fields – a peaceful backdrop that fosters focus, creativity and calm.

items.label: Outdoor Terrace
items.body: Step outside for a breath of fresh air. Ideal for informal chats, coffee breaks or simply enjoying nature between sessions.

items.label: The Summer House
items.body: A cozy, detached space ideal for breakout sessions, private calls or quiet focus – filled with natural light and views of the grounds.

feature_groups.heading: What's Included
feature_groups.intro: Our One-Price concept means everything you need is included, with no surprises at checkout. Every stay at FARMform features:

items.label: Breakfast Crafted for You
items.body: Start your day the right way.

items.label: Private Bathroom
items.body: Walk-in shower (and a bathtub in Executive Suite 2).

items.label: Access to all Facilities
items.body: Terraces, Spa (fitness & sauna) and Summer House.
